question: What is the name of the patient with the most recent admission?
gold_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name FROM patients p JOIN encounters e ON p.id = e.patient_id WHERE e.encounter_type = 'inpatient' ORDER BY e.admit_date DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;

question: List all patients born after 1990-01-01.
gold_sql: SELECT id, first_name, last_name, date_of_birth FROM patients WHERE date_of_birth > '1990-01-01' ORDER BY date_of_birth ASC LIMIT 100;

question: How many encounters occurred in the cardiology department?
gold_sql: SELECT count(e.id) FROM encounters e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE d.name ILIKE '%cardiology%' LIMIT 100;

question: Show me the top 3 most common diagnoses.
gold_sql: SELECT diagnosis_name, count(*) AS count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY diagnosis_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;
